fcm.comment: Firebase Cloud Messaging VAPID public key for Web Push. Generate via Firebase Console > Project Settings > Cloud Messaging > Web Push certificates.

serviceWorker.comment: Service worker handles background push notifications and must be served from root for scope.

minimal.title: Mo-nut
minimal.body: คุณมีการแจ้งเตือนใหม่
minimal.comment: No sensitive information on lock screen

summary.title: Mo-nut
summary.body: นัดหมาย / ยา / การแจ้งเตือน

full.comment: Full notification text if user opts in

fallback.comment: In-app notifications are always available as baseline. Web Push is opt-in enhancement.

lifecycle.comment: Refresh subscriptions older than 30 days (2592000 seconds)

quietHours.comment: User-configurable quiet hours for non-critical notifications

retryPolicy.comment: Retry failed deliveries with exponential backoff, expire after 3 days
